You finally realize why the first man was so adamant about steering clear of the Angels for yourself, being distorted and mutilated into something completely unrecognizable before He reverts you right back, only to do it all over again. No matter how much you cry, plead or barter, it's clear He has no intentions of being finished with you just yet.
